name: AOI Lighting Angle Optimization
description: As a machine vision engineer optimizing an Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) station, use the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API to determine the optimal lighting angle. Construct a scene with a test target at (0,0,0) (e.g., a flat gray base cuboid with a smaller white cylinder on top), a downward-facing Vision Sensor at (0,0,0.5), and a Spotlight. Evaluate at least 24 spotlight positions on a hemisphere (0.4m radius) above the target, ensuring the light is oriented toward the origin. Calculate the image contrast metric (standard deviation of pixel intensities) for each position. Export the results to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/ as lighting_sweep.csv (columns: pose_id, light_x, light_y, light_z, contrast_metric), lighting_report.json (fields: total_positions_tested, best_pose_id, best_x, best_y, best_z, max_contrast_metric, min_contrast_metric), and optimal_inspection.png (the vision sensor image captured at the highest contrast position). Login: username=ga, password=password123.
